# Suprascribe

> Suprascribe is a free, open-source subscription tracker that automatically discovers recurring payments by scanning email (Gmail, Outlook, iCloud, or any IMAP account). No SaaS - core features free forever, Pro features unlocked with a one-time €5 purchase.

## Key Information

- Homepage: https://www.suprascribe.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/akomis/suprascribe
- Contact: https://www.suprascribe.com/contact
- Pricing: Free (Basic) / €5 one-time (Pro)
- Email providers supported: Gmail (OAuth), Outlook/Microsoft (OAuth), iCloud (IMAP), any standard IMAP account

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.suprascribe.com): Landing page with features, pricing, and product overview
- [Demo](https://www.suprascribe.com/demo): Interactive product demo - see the dashboard without signing up
- [Safety](https://www.suprascribe.com/safety): How email discovery works, what data is accessed, privacy guarantees
- [Limits](https://www.suprascribe.com/limits): Discovery limits per tier and how to use your own AI API key (BYOK)
- [IMAP Guide](https://www.suprascribe.com/imap): Step-by-step guide to configure IMAP access for Gmail, Outlook, iCloud, and other providers
- [Contact](https://www.suprascribe.com/contact): Contact form for support, feedback, and questions
- [Terms & Privacy](https://www.suprascribe.com/terms-and-privacy): Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

## What Suprascribe Does

- Scans email inboxes (read-only) to identify subscription receipts and recurring billing
- Extracts service name, amount, currency, billing frequency, and renewal date using AI
- Displays all discovered subscriptions in a unified dashboard
- Tracks spending over time with insights and analytics
- Sends renewal reminders before subscriptions charge

## What Suprascribe Does NOT Do

- Does not read, store, or transmit email body content - only subject lines and sender info are processed
- Does not sell user data or share it with third parties
- Does not require ongoing payment - no subscription model
- Dashboard, user data, and API routes are private and not indexed by search engines

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js (App Router), Supabase (PostgreSQL), and the Vercel AI SDK
- Supports 11+ AI providers via BYOK (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Groq, OpenRouter, etc.)
- Fully open source under MIT license
